about.title: About My Studio Channel
content: My Studio Channel helps creators launch their own television-style platforms online. From talk shows and cooking shows to podcasts and documentaries, we design clean, organized websites that showcase programming the way a real network would.

Because we're creators too, we understand what it takes to present your work professionally. Every platform includes a custom built-in plugin with step-by-step tutorials, plus access to our creator community for continued learning and support.

features.title: Network-Style Layouts
features.description: Present your content like a professional streaming network with structured shows and episodes.

features.title: Creator Community
features.description: Access our exclusive creator community for continued learning and support as your channel grows.

features.title: Built-In Tutorials
features.description: Custom plugin with step-by-step tutorials so you never feel left figuring things out alone.

features.title: Ongoing Support
features.description: Direct communication with the team building your site, plus guided walkthrough after launch.

services.title: Programming Styles We Support
services.description: Whether you're launching a talk show, cooking show, podcast, or full series, your channel can be organized and presented like a professional network.
platformFeatures: Network-style layout that organizes your shows like a professional channel
Custom video players designed for a polished viewing experience
Structured programming layout that makes it easy for viewers to explore
Scalable platform design that can grow with your channel

ownPlatform.title: Own Your Platform, Not Just a Page
ownPlatform.description: My Studio Channel isn't a hosted service — it's your platform, built for you, on your own domain, with no recurring platform fees. You keep full control.

features.title: No Platform Lock-in
features.description: Your platform is built for you to own and operate independently. No monthly subscriptions, no per-subscriber fees.

features.title: You Control Everything
features.description: You control the content. You control your audience. You control how it grows.

features.title: Built With You
features.description: Every project is built with you involved in the process. You will meet with us, see the progress, and understand how your platform works before it launches.

packages.title: Channel Packages
packages.description: Choose the package that fits your vision. Every package includes a professionally designed platform with our custom Studio Channel plugin.

tiers.name: Creator Launch
tiers.description: Professional streaming-style website using YouTube video hosting.
tiers.bestFor: Creators who already host videos on YouTube and want a premium presentation layer.
features: YouTube videos embedded without suggested videos

tiers.name: Studio Pro
tiers.description: Professional video platform with your own hosted player.
tiers.bestFor: Creators who want their own professional streaming environment without relying on YouTube.
features: Video delivery powered by Presto Player

tiers.name: Network Platform
tiers.description: A full content platform with private member access.
tiers.bestFor: Creators launching their own streaming platform, academy, or subscription content network.

requirements.title: What You'll Need to Get Started

items.title: Images & Show Artwork
items.description: High-resolution logos, professional headshots, and any specific branding graphics (layered .PSD or .AI files are preferred if available).

items.title: Thumbnails
items.description: Eye-catching, high-contrast images (1920 x 1080px) that clearly represent your episodes or categories at a glance.

items.title: Video and/or Audio Files
items.description: Direct download links (Dropbox/Drive) or hosted URLs (YouTube/Vimeo) for the primary media content you want featured on the site.

items.title: Domain Name
items.description: The registered web address (URL) you intend to use, along with the login credentials for your registrar (e.g., SiteGround or Hostinger).

items.title: Hosting Account Access
items.description: Login credentials for your hosting provider (e.g., SiteGround, Cloudways). We recommend managed WordPress hosting for optimal performance.

testimonials.title: What Creators Are Saying
testimonials.description: Real results from creators we've worked with.

items.quote: I am thrilled to share my experience working with Yolando Brown. Her passion for her work shines through in everything she does. Her extensive knowledge and expertise in web development were invaluable, ensuring that our websites were not only visually stunning but also highly functional and user-friendly.
items.author: Tige

Their expertise not only helped me build a stunning online presence but also provided exceptional business coaching. The insightful tips and practical tools shared were instrumental in launching my beauty business successfully.

items.quote: The team was very professional and personable. The business is top-tier and she's a superstar. A very dedicated individual. I will continue to use her services for many years to come and will continue recommending the business to many friends and family!

builtForCreators.title: Built for Creators Like You
builtForCreators.description: Whether you're just starting or ready to grow, this platform is designed for creators who want more control. Creators come to My Studio Channel at different stages, but they all have one thing in common — they want a platform they can own, control, and grow.

types.title: Podcasters
types.description: Ready to organize and showcase their content

types.title: Content Creators
types.description: Tired of relying on social platforms

whatYouGet.title: What You Get with My Studio Channel
whatYouGet.description: Launch your own professional media website with everything you need to look like a network.

benefits.title: Consulting & Revisions
benefits.description: Guided consulting calls and included revisions to ensure your site is built correctly, efficiently, and ready for launch.

benefits.title: Studio-Style Website Layout
benefits.description: A professionally designed homepage and show pages that present your content with a clean, network-inspired structure.

benefits.title: Custom Plugin & Media Setup
benefits.description: Includes installation and setup of our proprietary Studio Channel plugin, developed in house to support studio style layouts, content presentation, and professional video and audio embedding.

addons.title: Add-Ons & Recommendations
addons.description: Enhance your platform with additional tools and services that help your channel look polished and launch successfully.

items.title: Thumbnails & Show Artwork
items.price: Starting at our rates per show
items.description: Includes custom video thumbnails, show artwork, episode artwork, and featured images designed for your platform.
items.note: Thumbnails are strongly recommended to achieve the intended studio-style layout. Without thumbnails, the visual presentation may be simplified.

items.title: Social Media Graphics Package
items.description: Includes professionally designed website headers, profile images, cover images, and promotional graphics so your brand looks consistent across platforms.

process.title: A Simple, Guided Process
process.description: Get your platform built and ready to launch in four straightforward steps.

steps.title: Book Your Consultation
steps.description: We start with a call to understand your goals and determine the right setup for your platform.

steps.title: Submit Your Materials
steps.description: Provide your content, links, and assets so we can begin building your platform.

steps.title: Build & Review
steps.description: We build your site with you, review it together, and make revisions based on your package.

steps.title: Launch Your Platform
steps.description: Your site is finalized, delivered, and ready for you to manage and grow.

experience.title: Built on Experience, Not Guesswork
content: We've been creating content and working with creators for over two decades. From early content production with Every Way Woman to building platforms through Inavizion Media and My Creative Space, our work has always centered around helping creators bring their ideas to life.

Since 2000, we've designed and built websites for clients across industries, with a focus on creators, entrepreneurs, and media-based businesses. Today, My Studio Channel brings that experience together — helping creators launch their own platform with structure, clarity, and real support.
whoWeWorkedWith: Creators and entrepreneurs through My Creative Space
Content creators, filmmakers, and brands through Inavizion Media
Clients from website builds, content capture, and coaching programs
Ongoing work with creators launching platforms through My Studio Channel

faq.title: Common Inquiries
faq.description: Find answers to the most frequently asked questions about our services and processes.

items.question: Why does pricing start at $5,800?
items.answer: This includes professional video setup, custom plugin installation, consulting, and studio-style layout work. Each platform is built with care to ensure it meets professional network standards.

items.question: Do I own my website and content?
items.answer: Yes. You fully own your site and all content. Unlike platforms that charge monthly fees and hold your content hostage, your platform is built for you to own and operate independently forever.

items.question: Do you provide hosting or domains?
items.answer: No, but we assist with setup and provide recommendations for reliable hosting providers. This keeps you in control of your infrastructure and costs.

items.question: Do you host videos?
items.answer: No, we connect your videos using professional players or platforms like Bunny.net. This gives you flexibility and control over your video hosting costs and performance.

items.question: What if I don't have thumbnails or artwork?
items.answer: Thumbnail and artwork creation is available as an add-on service. We can create professional thumbnails, show artwork, and promotional graphics that match your brand.

items.question: What do I need for consulting calls?
items.answer: Consulting calls must be attended on a desktop or laptop browser for optimal screen sharing. Mobile devices and tablets are not supported for these sessions.

policies.title: Policies & Requirements
policies.description: To begin your Studio Channel project, please review the following policies. Understanding these ensures a smooth, on-schedule build from start to launch.

items.title: Signed Agreement Required
items.description: A signed agreement is required before project commencement. This protects both you and our team and ensures all terms are clearly understood before work begins.

items.title: Payment via PayPal Only
items.description: Payment is accepted via PayPal only. A 50% non-refundable deposit is required to begin work. The remaining balance is paid in two installments: 25% mid-project and 25% prior to launch.

items.title: Materials Submitted Before Work Begins
items.description: All required content, assets, and materials must be submitted before your project can begin. Delays in submission may impact your project timeline.

items.title: Client Responsibility for Accuracy
items.description: Clients are responsible for providing accurate and complete materials, including text, images, video links, and branding elements.

items.title: Revisions Are Package-Based
items.description: Revisions are limited to the terms of the selected package. Additional revisions beyond what is included may require an additional fee.

items.title: Consulting Calls on Desktop Only
items.description: Consulting calls must be attended on a desktop or laptop using a web browser. Mobile devices and tablets are not supported for screen sharing sessions.

items.title: 72-Hour Response Window
items.description: All communication and approvals must be completed within 72 hours to keep the project on schedule. Delays in response may result in adjustments to the project timeline.

contact.title: Ready to Get Started?
contact.description: Schedule a consultation or reach out with questions — we'll walk you through the process step by step.

footer.tagline: Build a platform you own, control, and grow — without relying on social media platforms.
